overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the historic city of Saint Denis at night during a thunderstorm. The character travels from an urban street past a cemetery entrance, through an industrial district with a cannery, and finally onto open railroad tracks while lightning illuminates the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with historic brick buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wet street beside a large brick building, approaching a cemetery gate

entered.detail: multi-story historic brick industrial building with rows of illuminated windows
stone pillars with wrought iron fencing marking the cemetery entrance
cast iron gas lamp emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet cobblestone street at night, passing a large illuminated brick building on the left while approaching the stone pillars of a cemetery entrance on the right. Rain falls steadily as the warm glow of street lamps reflects off the damp ground.

events.description: character walks through the cemetery gate beneath the stone archway

agents.ego_description: passing through the cemetery gate and walking beneath the stone archway

entered.detail: ornate metal archway with 'ST DENIS' lettering spanning the entrance
tall stone wall with decorative coping and mounted lanterns

segments.scene_description: The character enters the cemetery through an ornate metal archway labeled 'ST DENIS', passing between stone pillars. The scene becomes more enclosed as the character walks alongside the high cemetery wall, with warm lamplight cutting through the rainy darkness.

events.description: industrial buildings and the Missouri Cannery sign become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cemetery wall as industrial buildings come into view ahead

entered.detail: painted sign for 'MISSOURI CANNERY' on brick building facade
cluster of brick industrial structures with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Walking along the perimeter of the cemetery, the character moves past gas street lamps as the industrial district ahead comes into view. The Missouri Cannery sign becomes visible on a building to the left while the cemetery wall continues on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with cannery and horse-drawn carriage

events.description: character passes a stationary horse-drawn carriage parked on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past the Missouri Cannery building and navigating around a parked horse-drawn carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked stationary on the side of the muddy road

entered.detail: large brick industrial building with loading dock and signage
wooden wagon with large spoked wheels hitched to horses
tall wooden plank fencing running along the left side
large red painted wooden barn-style door set in brick wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the industrial district, passing the Missouri Cannery building and navigating around a parked horse-drawn carriage. The environment opens up as the character moves past a large red wooden gate, with train tracks becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open railroad approach with distant industrial complex

events.description: lightning strike illuminates the sky above the distant buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the railroad tracks toward the distant town while lightning flashes across the sky

entered.detail: parallel metal railroad tracks running alongside the dirt path
tall wooden telegraph poles with crossbars and wires
cluster of buildings with smokestacks and bright electric lighting

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open area alongside railroad tracks, heading toward a distant industrial complex. The sky is fully visible as lightning strikes illuminate the storm clouds, revealing smokestacks and electric lights from the buildings ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the rain-slicked streets of Saint Denis, transitioning from a dense urban environment into an open industrial wasteland. It begins along a wet cobblestone street illuminated by warm lamps, moving past a large brick building toward the stone pillars of a cemetery entrance. As the character passes through an ornate metal archway, the scene becomes more enclosed along a high cemetery wall before the view opens up to reveal the Missouri Cannery sign and the surrounding industrial district. The camera then navigates past a parked horse-drawn carriage and a large red wooden gate, shifting the environment from narrow corridors to wide-open spaces. Finally, the shot emerges onto railroad tracks leading toward a distant industrial complex, where lightning strikes illuminate the storm clouds and far-off smokestacks.
